blocked_claims.reason: filesystem absence-beyond-observed claim requires completeness=full with no blind spots and confirmed clean capture; completeness is open_syscall_only; blind spots: io_uring file operations may bypass syscall tracepoints; mmap-backed writes are not path-open observations; the drift report does not surface per-arm observation health

network absence-beyond-observed claim requires completeness=full with no blind spots and confirmed clean capture; completeness is connect_only; blind spots: QUIC/datagram peer changes after connect are not an exhaustive peer set; io_uring network operations may bypass syscall tracepoints; the drift report does not surface per-arm observation health

process absence-beyond-observed claim requires completeness=full with no blind spots and confirmed clean capture; completeness is exec_only; blind spots: fork/clone gaps can make process-tree exhaustiveness kernel-dependent; the drift report does not surface per-arm observation health
